top_opportunities.title: Bounty
top_opportunities.body_preview: Here's a complete English bounty post template you can copy, paste, and adapt. It's designed to be easily parsed by bots (e.g., GitHub Actions, Discord "action board" scrapers) and follows typical Lean/Mathlib collaboration style. ```markdown [Bounty] $XXX – Formalize (or disprove) the "Prime Emergence Conjecture" ## Problem in plain language I propose a new conjecture related to prime emergence. *(Replace the following with your actual conjecture – keep it concise and precise)* **Conjecture (na

top_opportunities.title: DEEP SEEK
top_opportunities.body_preview: Ω-Coder：VSCode 插件伪代码 一、插件结构 ``` omega-coder/ ├── package.json # 插件配置 ├── extension.ts # 插件入口 ├── bountyCreator.ts # 悬赏创建模块 ├── bountyView.ts # 悬赏侧边栏 Webview ├── sandboxRunner.ts # 代码沙箱执行 ├── omegaArbiter.ts # 欧米伽裁决器 └── bountyChain.ts # 悬赏链集成（可选） ``` --- 二、package.json ```json { "name": "omega-coder", "displayName": "Ω-Coder", "description": "不写代码的编程助手——把你的需求变成悬赏，让AI来竞标", "version": "0.1.0", "engines": { "vscode": "^1.80.0" }, "activationEvents": ["onCommand:omega-coder.createBounty"], "contribu

top_opportunities.title: Add Hardhat test suite for ListingRegistry.sol
top_opportunities.body_preview: Build unit tests to verify: - Signature validity - Rejection of invalid signatures - Event emission - Seller mapping and metadata accuracy Optional: - Use Foundry in parallel for comparison Type: DevOps / QA Labels: testing, Solidity, help wanted

top_opportunities.title: feat: implement cancel_bounty to allow creators to retract open bounties
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Description Currently there is no mechanism for a bounty creator to cancel a bounty they have posted. If a maintainer creates a bounty, decides the issue is no longer relevant, or realises the reward amount is incorrect, they have no recourse — the bounty remains in the `"open"` state indefinitely, occupying the list and potentially attracting claims for work that will never be paid. Implementing `cancel_bounty` closes this gap and makes the bounty lifecycle complete from the creator's perspe

top_opportunities.title: Fleet-wide rollout of cron-spec-writer.sh source-check path fix (#218 follow-up)
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Found During Shipping #218 — Audit SCRIPT_DIR/lib vs repo-root scripts/lib path resolution in cron-spec-writer.sh ## Location .pi/scripts/cron-spec-writer.sh line ~54 + scripts/cron-spec-writer.sh line ~48 (the canonical source + its mirror) ## Symptom Per-project manual update needed for fleet projects running the shared cron-spec-writer.sh template. Without propagation via update.sh, every fleet project still has the latent path bug (the library is silently never sourced in any fleet projec

top_opportunities.title: 🎲 Research wildcard: "Insult Broadside" — comedic combat via wit + crew morale
top_opportunities.body_preview: **Research wildcard** from the Game Designer deep-learning loop (2026-06-27). Surfacing as backlog, not a commitment. ## Idea Put Ron Gilbert's "insult sword-fighting" (Monkey Island) on the water. During a ship engagement, alongside cannon fire, the two crews trade **shouted insults across the waves**. The player picks a jab; the enemy captain needs the right comeback. - **Land a cutting insult** → drops the **enemy crew's morale** → raises surrender/flee odds (capture the prize intact instead

top_opportunities.title: Add proof-of-completion for bounties
top_opportunities.body_preview: **Description**: Bounties can be claimed without verification **File Change**: `src/bounty_board.rs` **Accepted Criteria**: - Add evidence submission requirement - Implement verification by poster - Add dispute resolution mechanism **PR Branch**: `feat/bounty-verification` **PR Title**: Feature: Add bounty completion verification **Additional Note**: Prevents fraudulent claims

top_opportunities.title: Seeking external cryptographic reviewer for first signed release
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## What this is The first signed release of `infnoise-provider` is gated on a single remaining task: an external cryptographic review of [src/infnoise_prov.c](src/infnoise_prov.c). Everything else on the path-to-release checklist in [docs/TODO.txt](docs/TODO.txt) is done. ## Scope at a glance - **One file under deep review**: `src/infnoise_prov.c` (~660 lines, ~444 effective after stripping comments and blanks). - **Language and surface**: C11, OpenSSL 3.x Provider API, `OSSL_OP_RAND` seed sourc

top_opportunities.title: [BOUNTY] N64 RustChain Mining ROM — Mine Crypto on Nintendo 64 (200 RTC)
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Mine RustChain on a Nintendo 64 — 200 RTC Cross-posted from [Rustchain #1877](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/issues/1877). Integrate RustChain miner attestation into this ROM so a real N64 can participate in the blockchain network with a **4x MIPS antiquity multiplier** (MYTHIC tier). ### Requirements - RustChain attestation protocol via serial/USB bridge to host relay - Hardware fingerprinting using MIPS III CPU characteristics - Submit `device_arch: "mips_r4300"`, `device_family: "N6
